It quickly became a cheap and popular drink." So from this sentence, it's clear that the owner of a chocolate factory in England made this discovery. Let's match this to the options given. Option D says "the owner of a chocolate factory," which aligns with the text. Option C says "the people in England," which is close because the factory is in England, but the specific person is the owner. So option D is more accurate. Other
